${modID}:Bellows.NAME: Bellows
${modID}:Bellows.FLAVOR: Your signature is branded into the handle. You made this one yourself.
DESCRIPTIONS: The first time you gain #y${modID}:Heat each turn, gain #b1 #y${modID}:Intensity.

${modID}:Broom.NAME: Broom
${modID}:Broom.FLAVOR: Helps to clean up any mess you make.
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you #y${modID}:Scrap a card, gain #b2 additional #y${modID}:Scrap_Armor. NL #y${modID}:Scrap_Armor deals #b50% less damage.

${modID}:ButcherKnife.NAME: Butcher Knife
${modID}:ButcherKnife.FLAVOR: Perfect for cutting meat and flesh.
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you apply #y${modID}:Laceration, apply an additional #b1 #y${modID}:Laceration.

${modID}:DeadlyRose.NAME: Deadly Rose
DESCRIPTIONS: Every #b5 times you apply a debuff to an enemy, draw #b1 card.

${modID}:LargeAcorn.NAME: Large Acorn
DESCRIPTIONS: The first time you trigger #y${modID}:Reckless each turn, gain [E] .

${modID}:Matchbox.NAME: Matchbox
${modID}:Matchbox.FLAVOR: The edges are scorched, worn thin by habit.

${modID}:Metronome.NAME: Metronome
${modID}:Metronome.FLAVOR: That sound would drive anyone insane.

${modID}:RedFlag.NAME: Red Flag
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you add a #y${modID}:Reckless card to your deck, raise your Max HP by #b3.

${modID}:TornManifesto.NAME: Torn Manifesto
DESCRIPTIONS: Replaces [#ff69b4]Manifesto. #y${modID}:Scrap_Armor deals damage to ALL enemies. At the start of your turn, gain #b3 #y${modID}:Scrap_Armor.

${modID}:Whip.NAME: Whip
${modID}:Whip.FLAVOR: Once your oppressor — now it empowers you.
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take #b3 damage.
